mapper.insert: INSERT INTO `schedule` (concertId, title, performDate, startAt, totalSeats, maxRows, maxCols, price, body, status, regDate, updateDate) VALUES (#{concertId}, #{title}, #{performDate}, #{startAt}, #{totalSeats}, #{maxRows}, #{maxCols}, #{price}, #{body}, IFNULL(#{status}, 'DRAFT'), NOW(), NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT s.*, c.title AS extra__concertTitle, c.posterImg AS extra__posterImg, c.bookingStartAt AS extra__bookingStartAt, c.startDate AS extra__concertStartDate, c.endDate AS extra__concertEndDate FROM `schedule` s INNER JOIN concert c ON s.concertId = c.id WHERE s.id = #{id}
mapper.update: UPDATE `schedule` SET title = #{title}, performDate= #{performDate}, startAt = #{startAt}, totalSeats = #{totalSeats}, maxRows = #{maxRows}, maxCols = #{maxCols}, price = #{price}, body = #{body}, updateDate = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE `schedule` SET status = #{status}, updateDate = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO seatGrade (regDate, updateDate, scheduleId, name, price) VALUES (NOW(), NOW(), #{scheduleId}, #{name}, #{price})
INSERT INTO seat (regDate, updateDate, scheduleId, gradeId, rowName, colNumber, `status`) VALUES (NOW(), NOW(), #{scheduleId}, #{gradeId}, #{row}, #{col}, #{status})
mapper.select: SELECT id, name, price FROM seatGrade WHERE scheduleId = #{scheduleId} ORDER BY id ASC

SELECT SG.name AS extra__gradeName, SG.price AS extra__price, COUNT(S.id) AS remainCount FROM seatGrade AS SG LEFT JOIN seat AS S ON SG.id = S.gradeId AND S.`status` = 'AVAILABLE' WHERE SG.scheduleId = #{scheduleId} GROUP BY SG.id

SELECT s.totalSeats AS totalSeats, IFNULL(COUNT(r.id), 0) AS reservedCount, IFNULL(SUM(r.paidPrice), 0) AS revenue FROM `schedule` s LEFT JOIN reservation r ON s.id = r.scheduleId AND r.status = 'CONFIRMED' WHERE s.id = #{scheduleId} GROUP BY s.id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO concertCasting (scheduleId, artistId, roleName) VALUES (#{scheduleId}, #{artistId}, #{roleName})
mapper.select: SELECT A.id, A.name, A.profileImg, CC.roleName FROM concertCasting AS CC INNER JOIN artist AS A ON CC.artistId = A.id WHERE CC.scheduleId = #{scheduleId}
SELECT DISTINCT A.id, A.name, A.profileImg, CC.roleName FROM concertCasting CC JOIN artist A ON CC.artistId = A.id WHERE CC.scheduleId IN (SELECT id FROM `schedule` WHERE concertId = #{concertId})
